overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a first-person perspective walking along a multi-lane urban highway. The scene features illuminated modern glass office towers, street lights casting orange glow on asphalt, and passing vehicles against a dark blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway shoulder with modern office district

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder with tall illuminated buildings on the left

entered.detail: curved modern skyscraper with illuminated windows dominating the left side
large rectangular billboard with bright white lighting
tall street lamp with dual yellow lights casting orange glow on road
cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a highway at night. A tall curved glass office tower with illuminated windows dominates the left side, while a bright billboard is visible in the distance on the right. Street lights cast warm orange pools of light on the asphalt as the camera moves steadily forward toward the downtown skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approaching downtown core with road markings

events.description: character's hands enter the frame from bottom, confirming first-person perspective

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway with hands now visible at bottom of frame, approaching the downtown area

entered.detail: overhead road signs visible in the distance above the highway
pair of hands wearing white sleeves visible at bottom of frame

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward along the highway, with the tall office tower receding into the distance on the left. White arrow road markings become visible on the asphalt. Around the 40-second mark, the character's hands enter the frame, confirming the first-person perspective. The downtown skyline grows larger ahead with multiple illuminated buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with active traffic and billboards

events.description: black SUV with headlights on approaches and passes by on the road
large semi-truck with trailer approaches with bright headlights

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway shoulder as vehicles pass by in the adjacent lanes

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past with headlights illuminated
large semi-truck with trailer approaching with bright headlights

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement billboard on the left side of the highway
steel highway guardrail running along the left edge of the frame
elevated highway overpass visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking past a metal guardrail with illuminated billboards on the left. Vehicles including a black SUV and a large semi-truck approach with bright headlights and pass by on the multi-lane road. The tall office tower from the beginning is now behind, and an overpass is visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a nighttime urban highway that transitions from the shadow of a single skyscraper toward a dense, illuminated downtown skyline. It begins with a steady forward movement past a tall, curved glass office tower on the left and a distant billboard on the right, with street lights casting warm orange pools across the asphalt. As the camera advances, the tower recedes into the distance and white arrow road markings appear on the ground, while the character's hands enter the frame to anchor the perspective. The scene then shifts as the camera passes a metal guardrail and bright billboards, with the headlights of a black SUV and a large semi-truck cutting through the dark as they pass by on the multi-lane road. Finally, the view opens up toward a distant overpass as the initial office tower disappears behind the camera, leaving the glowing city center as the primary focal point.
